description_long: This object is a collection of various cabinets and shelving units, each with distinct compartments, doors, and open shelving spaces. The units are primarily rectangular and boxy, with some featuring double doors, drawers, and open cubbies. The surfaces appear to be made of metal or painted wood, with a smooth, matte finish and a neutral gray color palette. Some units have visible handles or pulls, while others have flat, handle-less fronts. The arrangement suggests modularity, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on storage and organization rather than decorative elements.
description: A modular set of gray cabinets and shelves with doors, drawers, and open compartments, designed for practical storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profiles of the cabinets and shelves, with visible door edges and some handles.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full faces of the cabinets, doors, drawers, and open shelving units, highlighting their storage features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profiles and the arrangement of the units in a row.
description_view_3: Rear or angled view revealing the backs and some open compartments, with less detail on the doors and handles.
